import React from 'react'; import Sidebar from './Sidebar'; // Upper normal limits (per HPF - High Power Field) const NORMAL_LIMITS = { 'Calcium Oxalate': 5, 'Uric Acid': 3, 'Struvite': 2, 'Calcium Phosphate': 3, }; function getCloseness(count, limit) { return Math.round((count / limit) * 100); } function getClosenessColor(pct) { if (pct > 100) return '#E24B4A'; // Exceeded - Red if (pct >= 80) return '#C07320'; // Near limit - Orange return '#1FB505'; // Normal - Green } function getClosenessLabel(pct) { if (pct > 100) return 'Exceeded'; if (pct >= 80) return 'Near Limit'; return 'Normal'; } export default function Export({ goToUpload, goToResults, goToAnalysis, goToLogin }) { const crystals = [ { name: 'Calcium Oxalate', count: 23, pct: 48, color: '#E24B4A' }, { name: 'Uric Acid', count: 12, pct: 25, color: '#1FB505' }, { name: 'Struvite', count: 5, pct: 10, color: '#6D9922' }, { name: 'Calcium Phosphate', count: 8, pct: 17, color: '#6D7758' }, ].map(c => ({ ...c, normalLimit: NORMAL_LIMITS[c.name], closeness: getCloseness(c.count, NORMAL_LIMITS[c.name]), })); return (
🔬
Crystal Analysis Pro
Automated Urinary Crystal Identification
System Ready
{}} />
Detected crystals (48)
{/* Legend */}
Normal (<80%) Near Limit (80–100%) Exceeded (>100%)
Type
Count
%
Normal Limit
Threshold Closeness
Status
{crystals.map((crystal, i) => { const color = getClosenessColor(crystal.closeness); const barWidth = Math.min(crystal.closeness, 100); return (
{crystal.name}
{crystal.count}
{crystal.pct}%
{crystal.normalLimit} /HPF
{crystal.closeness}%
{getClosenessLabel(crystal.closeness)}
); })}
* Threshold closeness = (crystal count ÷ upper normal limit) × 100. Bar capped at 100%.
); } const styles = { app: { display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', width: '100%', height: '100vh', background: '#EEF0E8', overflow: 'hidden' }, topbar: { flexShrink: 0, height: '56px', background: '#fff', borderBottom: '1.5px solid #D8DAD0', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', padding: '0 20px', gap: '10px' }, logoMark: { fontSize: '24px' }, appTitle: { fontSize: '15px', fontWeight: 700, color: '#141514' }, appSub: { fontSize: '11px', color: '#A4AAA4', marginLeft: '8px' }, topbarRight: { marginLeft: 'auto', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '10px' }, statusChip: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '6px', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 500, color: '#306A33' }, statusDot: { width: '8px', height: '8px', borderRadius: '50%', background: '#1FB505' }, btnLogout: { padding: '7px 18px', borderRadius: '8px', border: 'none', background: '#E24B4A', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 600, color: '#fff', cursor: 'pointer' }, body: { flex: 1, display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '210px 1fr', minHeight: 0, overflow: 'hidden' }, main: { display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', minHeight: 0, overflow: 'hidden', background: '#EEF0E8' }, pane: { flex: 1, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', padding: '20px 28px', gap: '14px', minHeight: 0, overflowY: 'auto' }, expTitle: { flexShrink: 0, fontSize: '14px', fontWeight: 700, color: '#141514' }, legend: { display: 'flex', gap: '14px', flexWrap: 'wrap' }, legendItem: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '5px', fontSize: '10px', color: '#A4AAA4' }, legendDot: { width: '8px', height: '8px', borderRadius: '50%', flexShrink: 0 }, expTable: { flex: 1, background: '#fff', border: '1px solid #D8DAD0', borderRadius: '14px', overflow: 'hidden', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', minHeight: 0 }, expThead: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '2fr 0.8fr 0.8fr 1fr 2.5fr 1fr', background: '#1F5330', flexShrink: 0 }, eth: { padding: '10px 12px', fontSize: '10px', fontWeight: 700, color: '#9FC8A8', letterSpacing: '0.06em', textTransform: 'uppercase' }, expBody: { flex: 1, overflow: 'hidden' }, erow: { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: '2fr 0.8fr 0.8fr 1fr 2.5fr 1fr', borderBottom: '1px solid #EEEFE8', alignItems: 'center' }, etd: { padding: '10px 12px', fontSize: '12px', color: '#141514', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '8px' }, ddot: { width: '10px', height: '10px', borderRadius: '50%', flexShrink: 0 }, ebar: { flex: 1, height: '6px', background: '#D8DAD0', borderRadius: '3px', margin: '0 6px', position: 'relative' }, efill: { height: '100%', borderRadius: '3px' }, thresholdLine: { position: 'absolute', right: 0, top: '-3px', width: '2px', height: '12px', background: '#A4AAA4', borderRadius: '1px' }, thresholdNote: { fontSize: '10px', color: '#A4AAA4', fontStyle: 'italic' }, bbar: { flexShrink: 0, padding: '12px 0', display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'flex-end', gap: '8px' }, btnGhost: { padding: '7px 16px', borderRadius: '8px', border: '1px solid #D8DAD0', background: '#fff', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 600, color: '#306A33', cursor: 'pointer' }, btnSolid: { padding: '7px 16px', borderRadius: '8px', border: 'none', background: '#1F5330', fontSize: '12px', fontWeight: 600, color: '#fff', cursor: 'pointer' }, };
